source_note: FERC ALJ Initial Decision re BP Pipelines (Alaska) Inc. et al. interstate oil-pipeline rates for the Trans-Alaska Pipeline System (TAPS), lead Docket IS09-395 (consolidated TAPS Carrier rate cases), issued 2014-02-27. An oil-pipeline cost/rate prudence proceeding (eLibrary mis-tags the library as Gas; the IS docket prefix and TAPS carriers are oil). Metadata-only (free-form legal order). Found via the eLibrary AdvancedSearch API (searchText=IS09-395); accession 20140227-3052.
